parameters.bodyParametersJson: ={{ (() => { const p = $items('Prepare Graph Payload')[0].json; const stmts = (p.cleanupStatements || []).map(s => ({ statement: s })); stmts.push({ statement: p.cypher }); return { statements: stmts }; })() }}

={{ { "statements": [ { "statement": $items('Prepare Graph Payload')[0].json.postProcess, "parameters": { "project": $items('Prepare Graph Payload')[0].json.project_name } }, { "statement": "MATCH (r:Rule) WHERE r.graph = 'Metagraph' AND (r.description IS NULL OR r.description = '') SET r.description = $description, r.RuleDescription = $description", "parameters": { "description": $items('Prepare Graph Payload')[0].json.rules_text || '' } } ] } }}
